summary.en: Power tools with electric motors, chargers, electronic speed controls, or battery-management electronics must address electromagnetic compatibility under TR CU 020/2011 before EAC marking for Kazakhstan. Accredited declaration or certification evidence should cover emissions, immunity, model scope, power modes, and accessories used with the tool system.
summary.zh: 带电机、充电器、电子调速或电池管理电子部件的电动工具，在哈萨克斯坦加贴 EAC 标志前须按 TR CU 020/2011 处理电磁兼容。认可声明或认证证据应覆盖发射、抗扰度、型号范围、电源模式及与工具系统配套使用的附件。
summary.zht: 帶電機、充電器、電子調速或電池管理電子部件的電動工具，在哈薩克斯坦加貼 EAC 標誌前須按 TR CU 020/2011 處理電磁相容。認可聲明或認證證據應覆蓋發射、抗擾度、型號範圍、電源模式及與工具系統配套使用的附件。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 Electromagnetic compatibility of technical means
EAC declaration or certification through accredited conformity-assessment bodies
GOST IEC or GOST CISPR EMC standards used as supporting technical evidence

summary.en: China power-tool EMC evidence commonly uses GB 4343 series testing, sometimes combined with CCC files where the product or accessory falls in a covered category. That evidence should be reviewed against the TR CU 020/2011 model and accessory scope rather than accepted as automatic EAC proof.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具 EMC 证据通常使用 GB 4343 系列测试，并在产品或附件属于覆盖类别时结合 CCC 文件。该证据应按 TR CU 020/2011 的型号和附件范围复核，不能自动作为 EAC 证明。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具 EMC 證據通常使用 GB 4343 系列測試，並在產品或附件屬於覆蓋類別時結合 CCC 文件。該證據應按 TR CU 020/2011 的型號和附件範圍覆核，不能自動作為 EAC 證明。

standards_or_laws: CCC where applicable for China domestic market access

gap.en: The common gap is scope mismatch: a China EMC report for one motor, charger, or speed-control configuration may not cover all Kazakhstan-bound kits, battery packs, adapters, and operating modes included in the EAC declaration.
gap.zh: 常见差距是范围不一致：针对某一电机、充电器或调速配置的中国 EMC 报告，未必覆盖 EAC 声明中所有发往哈萨克斯坦的套装、电池包、适配器和工作模式。
gap.zht: 常見差距是範圍不一致：針對某一電機、充電器或調速配置的中國 EMC 報告，未必覆蓋 EAC 聲明中所有發往哈薩克斯坦的套裝、電池包、適配器和工作模式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope technical means under TR CU 020/2011; EAC conformity evidence is required before Kazakhstan market placement.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343 and CCC where applicable are China-side baselines and must be mapped before use in an EAEU EMC file.

source.publisher: Adilet Legal Information System of Regulatory Legal Acts of the Republic of Kazakhstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Kazakhstan-ready until TR CU 020/2011 EMC scope, representative configurations, and accredited EAC conformity evidence cover the actual tool, charger, and battery kits shipped.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 TR CU 020/2011 EMC 范围、代表性配置和认可 EAC 合格评定证据覆盖实际出货的工具、充电器和电池套装前，不能视为哈萨克斯坦就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 TR CU 020/2011 EMC 範圍、代表性配置和認可 EAC 合格評定證據覆蓋實際出貨的工具、充電器和電池套裝前，不能視為哈薩克斯坦就緒。
